content.text: Excellent! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the wiki-common crate. Let me create a detailed summary report: ## Comprehensive wiki-common Crate Analysis ### 1. **Types/Structs Available** **Core Model** (`model.rs`): - **`WikiPage`**: The main content structure - `title: String` - page title - `content: String` - page markdown/wiki content - `created_at: u64` - Unix timestamp (creation time) - `updated_at: u64` - Unix timestamp (last update) - Constructor: `WikiPage::new(title, content, now) -> Self` - Derives: `Clone, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq` **Age Tiers** (`aging.rs`): - **`AgeTier`** enum with variants: - `Fresh` - less than 7 days - `Recent` - 7-30 days - `Stale` - 30-90 days - `Old` - 90-180 days - `Ancient` - 180+ days - Method: `css_class() -> &'static str` returns CSS classes like "age-fresh", "age-ancient" **Patch Operations** (`patch.rs`, server feature only): - **`PatchRequest`**: Deserializable request struct with `etag: String` and `ops: Vec` - **`PatchOp`** enum (JSON tag-based): - `Replace { match_str, replace }` - replace first occurrence - `AppendAfter { match_str, text }` - append after matching line - `InsertBefore { match_str, text }` - insert before matching line - `Delete { match_str }` - delete matching text - **`PatchError`**: Error struct with `op_index: usize` and `match_str: String` --- ### 2. **Parsing Functions for Markdown/Wiki-Links** **Main Parsing Entry Point** (`parser.rs`): - **`render_wiki_content(raw: &str) -> String`** - PRIMARY FUNCTION - Orchestrates the two-step process: expand wiki links → render markdown - Escapes raw HTML (except wiki-link anchors) for security - Returns HTML string **Wiki Link Expansion** (`parser.rs`, private): - **`expand_wiki_links(input: &str) -> String`** - Converts `[[PageName]]` and `[[PageName|Display Text]]` syntax into HTML anchor tags - Respects backtick boundaries (doesn't expand inside inline code) - Generates: `DISPLAY` **Markdown Rendering** (`parser.rs`, private): - **`markdown_to_html(input: &str) -> String`** - Uses `pulldown-cmark` parser - Filters out raw HTML **except** wiki-link anchors (`class="wiki-link"`) - Protects against XSS by stripping HTML --- ### 3. **Storage Traits/Interfaces** **Synchronous Storage** (`storage.rs`): ```rust pub trait WikiStorage { fn get_page(&self, title: &str) -> Option; fn save_page(&self, page: WikiPage); fn delete_page(&self, title: &str); fn list_pages(&self) -> Vec; fn has_page(&self, title: &str) -> bool; } ``` - **Purpose**: WASM frontend storage backends - **Blocking API** - synchronous method calls **Asynchronous Storage** (`async_storage.rs`, server feature only): ```rust #[async_trait] pub trait AsyncWikiStorage: Send + Sync { async fn get_page(&self, title: &str) -> Option; async fn save_page(&self, page: WikiPage); async fn delete_page(&self, title: &str); async fn list_pages(&self) -> Vec; async fn has_page(&self, title: &str) -> bool; } ``` - **Purpose**: Server-side async backends - **Requires** `async_trait` crate (re-exported from `async_storage::async_trait`) - Marks trait bounds: `Send + Sync` --- ### 4. **"Server" Feature Flag** When enabled with `features = ["server"]` in Cargo.toml, provides: 1. **`async_storage` module** - `AsyncWikiStorage` trait for async backends - Re-exports `async_trait::async_trait` macro 2. **`etag` module** - **`content_etag(content: &str) -> String`** - computes SHA-256 based ETag - Returns quoted hex string format: `"a1b2c3..."` - Deterministic, suitable for HTTP caching headers 3. **`patch` module** - Complete patch operation system for content updates - `apply_ops(content: &str, ops: &[PatchOp]) -> Result` - Sequential patch application with line-based operations - Preserves trailing newlines in content **Dependencies enabled by "server" feature**: - `async-trait = "0.1"` - for async trait syntax - `sha2 = "0.10"` - for ETag SHA-256 hashing --- ### 5. **Public API Surface (lib.rs exports)** **Always Available**: - `pub mod aging` - age tier calculations and CSS mapping - `pub mod model` - `WikiPage` struct - `pub mod parser` - `render_wiki_content()` function - `pub mod storage` - `WikiStorage` trait - `pub mod time` - timestamp helpers **Conditional (server feature)**: - `pub mod async_storage` - `AsyncWikiStorage` trait + `async_trait` re-export - `pub mod etag` - `content_etag()` function - `pub mod patch` - `PatchRequest`, `PatchOp`, `PatchError`, `apply_ops()` --- ### 6. **Additional Utilities** **Time Module** (`time.rs`): - **`now() -> u64`** - returns current Unix seconds - WASM version: uses `js_sys::Date::now()` / 1000 - Native version: uses `std::time::SystemTime` - **`file_mtime(path: &Path) -> u64`** - file modification time (native only) - Returns Unix seconds, defaults to 0 on error **Aging Module** (`aging.rs`): - **`age_tier(updated_at: u64, now: u64) -> AgeTier`** - Calculates staleness based on update timestamp - Handles zero timestamp as "Fresh" (legacy support) - `time::now()` is the typical `now` parameter --- ### 7. **Key Design Notes** **Security**: - Wiki links are explicitly safe (class-based filtering) - Raw HTML is stripped from markdown (prevents XSS) - Only pre-generated wiki-link anchors survive markdown rendering **Timestamps**: - Unix seconds (u64), zero means unknown/legacy - `created_at` and `updated_at` are separate tracking **Patch System**: - Line-based operations for AppendAfter/InsertBefore - String-based matching (not regex) - Preserves original trailing newlines - Sequential application (each op works on previous result) **Cross-Platform**: - WASM support with conditional compilation (`target_arch = "wasm32"`) - Async trait support gated by "server" feature --- ### File Paths - Main library: `/Users/mike/github/sw-vibe-coding/wiki-rs/shared/wiki-common/src/lib.rs` - Models: `/Users/mike/github/sw-vibe-coding/wiki-rs/shared/wiki-common/src/model.rs` - Parser: `/Users/mike/github/sw-vibe-coding/wiki-rs/shared/wiki-common/src/parser.rs` - Storage traits: `/Users/mike/github/sw-vibe-coding/wiki-rs/shared/wiki-common/src/storage.rs` - Async storage: `/Users/mike/github/sw-vibe-coding/wiki-rs/shared/wiki-common/src/async_storage.rs` - Aging: `/Users/mike/github/sw-vibe-coding/wiki-rs/shared/wiki-common/src/aging.rs` - ETag: `/Users/mike/github/sw-vibe-coding/wiki-rs/shared/wiki-common/src/etag.rs` - Patch: `/Users/mike/github/sw-vibe-coding/wiki-rs/shared/wiki-common/src/patch.rs` - Time: `/Users/mike/github/sw-vibe-coding/wiki-rs/shared/wiki-common/src/time.rs` - Cargo.toml: `/Users/mike/github/sw-vibe-coding/wiki-rs/shared/wiki-common/Cargo.toml`
